mapper.select: SELECT id, record_year, record_month, total_green_kwh, solar_kwh, contract_kwh, procurement_kwh, usage_kwh, achievement_rate, surplus_kwh, locked_by, locked_at, created_at FROM monthly_summary_snapshots WHERE record_year = #{recordYear} AND record_month = #{recordMonth} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO monthly_summary_snapshots ( record_year, record_month, total_green_kwh, solar_kwh, contract_kwh, procurement_kwh, usage_kwh, achievement_rate, surplus_kwh, locked_by, locked_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{recordYear}, #{recordMonth}, #{totalGreenKwh}, #{solarKwh}, #{contractKwh}, #{procurementKwh}, #{usageKwh}, #{achievementRate}, #{surplusKwh}, #{lockedBy}, #{lockedAt}, NOW() )
